nasb.text: As for me, You uphold me in my integrity, And You set me in Your presence forever.

esv.text: But you have upheld me because of my integrity, and set me in your presence forever.

cnv.text: 至於我，你因為我正直，就扶持我； 你使我永遠站在你面前。

ccb.text: 你因我正直而扶持我， 让我永远侍立在你面前。

csbs.text: 至于我，因我的纯全，你扶持我， 使我永远站立在你面前。
